description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:2.7 Docker image and defines two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add an apidoc job that runs the global before_script `pip install -r requirements.txt`, then `cd docs` and `fab make`, and publishes the `docs/build/html` directory as an artifact that expires in one day. Also in test add a coverage job that runs `pip install -r requirements.txt`, then `nosetests -c .noserc -q --cover-html-dir=build --cover-html` and `coverage report -m`, stores the `build` directory as a one‑day artifact, and extracts the total coverage percentage with the regex `/TOTAL.+ ([0-9]{1,3}%)/`. Add a runTest job in test that runs `pip install -r requirements.txt` followed by `nosetests -sx`. In the deploy stage add a pages job that overrides the before_script with `true`, depends on the apidoc and coverage jobs, creates `public/coverage`, copies the generated HTML docs and coverage reports into `public/`, and publishes the `public` folder as the GitLab Pages artifact.
